news_items.headline: Global semiconductor market forecast at $1.29 trillion in 2026 - 52.8% surge driven by AI infrastructure
news_items.data_pt: $1.29T market size forecast; 52.8% YoY growth; HBM primary constraint in AI accelerator supply chain

news_items.headline: TSMC Arizona Fab 2 pulled forward to 2027; Intel Ohio production pushed back from 2026 to 2030
news_items.data_pt: TSMC Fab 2: 2027 start (from 2028); Intel Ohio: 2030 start (from 2026); existing fabs offline for retrofits reducing near-term output

news_items.headline: Qatar LNG disruptions removed 20% of global LNG supply in March 2026 due to missile/drone strikes
news_items.data_pt: March 2026: 20% global LNG supply removed at Ras Laffan hub; affects chipmaker power requirements and broader semiconductor fab operations

news_items.headline: Bank of America delays Fed rate cuts forecast to July-September 2027; no cuts expected in 2026
news_items.data_pt: Previous forecast: Sept 2026 cuts; Revised forecast: July & Sept 2027; Reason: core inflation elevated, solid jobs data

news_items.headline: Middle East war caused largest oil supply disruption in history; Strait of Hormuz handles ~20% of global oil supply
news_items.data_pt: Oil supply reduction: 10+ million barrels/day; Strait closure: February 28 start, flows restricted; Brent averaged $117/barrel in April

news_items.headline: Brent oil forecast at $86/barrel for 2026 average; $115 possible if disruptions extend
news_items.data_pt: 2025 average: $69/barrel; 2026 forecast: $86/barrel baseline; Worst case: $115/barrel if acuate disruptions extend; Energy prices projected +24% in 2026

news_items.headline: Middle East production shut-ins peaked at 10.8 million barrels/day in May 2026; Strait reopens late May per baseline scenario
news_items.data_pt: April shut-ins: 10.5 Mb/d; May peak forecast: 10.8 Mb/d; Strait reopening: late May baseline (late June upside risk); Recovery: late 2026/early 2027
